summary: PDC v2 Workflow Testing Complete - All 8 test requirements verified. Backend: (1) Cooperative blocked from modifying Step 1 after agent submission (403), (2) Cooperative can read PDC at any step, (3) Cooperative can save Step 2, (4) Cooperative can save Step 3, (5) Farmer blocked from non-validated PDC (403). Frontend: (6) Blue 'Mode lecture' banner shown for Step 1 with disabled fields, (7) Cooperative can navigate to Step 2/3 with appropriate banners, (8) Farmer PDC list correctly filters to show only validated PDCs.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend pdc_v2.py save_step1 correctly blocks cooperative when current_step >= 2 with 403 (lines 281-283)
Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx canEditStep1 logic correctly checks step1SubmittedByAgent (lines 44-46)
Workflow banners correctly implemented: blue for step1 readonly (lines 874-881), amber for step2 (lines 883-890), purple for step3 (lines 892-899), green for farmer validated (lines 901-908)
Form fields in Step 1 correctly disabled for cooperative when step1SubmittedByAgent is true (14 disabled elements verified)
Backend get_pdc correctly blocks farmer access to non-validated PDCs (lines 261-263)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing PDC ID 69d97a7ff2a45f9a4e690268 (Test Planteur Complet, etape3_en_cours)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDC v2 workflow permissions fully tested. Key PDC for testing: ID=69d97a7ff2a45f9a4e690268 (farmer=Test Planteur Complet, current_step=3, statut=etape3_en_cours). Validated PDC exists: ID=69d962b4145394c29d77fd02 (farmer=Koffi, statut=valide). Test planteur (testplanteur@test.ci) has no PDCs assigned.
